items.name: Lightning Horn of the Heavens
items.description: Click to summon massive lightning from the heavens.  Anyone close to a strike will be knocked to the ground and blown away from it, doing an additional 20 damage. Anyone directly hit will take 100 damage!

items.name: Sonic Boom Tuba
items.description: Loud doesn't even begin to describe it.

items.name: Trident
items.description: Short range weapon that can also be thrown (double click to throw).

items.name: Attack Racket
items.description: They can't hit what they can't touch! Swing this tennis racket, firing flaming tennis balls at your opponent! If hit, the tennis balls deal 20 damage per hit.

items.name: Zoom Broom 5000
items.description: The fastest broom on the market, be sure to hold on tight! Equip and click and drag to fly around in the direction of your cursor.

items.name: The Overseer's Bow
items.description: Overseer bow - Powerful ranged weapon of the overseers that does 35 damage per hit and 100 damage upon headshot. Also has the ability to rapidly fire projectiles on all directions poisoning your enemies doing upto 70 damage to them over 4 seconds.

items.name: Laser Gun of Tomorrow
items.description: Click to fire a burst of 5 neon teal colored lasers! Each do 8 damage. If all 5 hit their target, that's a total of 40 damage!

items.name: Deluxe Hook Shot
items.description: This deluxe grappling hook will pull small unanchored object (like other players) towards you.  When used on larger items, it will propel you toward the item or place.

items.name: 2015 Fireworks
items.description: Light up the night to celebrate 2015!

items.name: Bo Staff 7000
items.description: Use this futuristic Bo Staff to slash at your foes and do 15 damage.  Hit 'Q' to activate its special ability - a forcefield that instantly kills your foes.

items.name: Bejeweled Sword of Great Fury
items.description: Do you see red or blue?  This fierce sword lets you switch between Ruby and Sapphire attacks.  In Ruby mode you deal 40 damage per hit, but take 15 damage yourself. In Sapphire mode you do 15 damage per hit, but can strike at a great speed, and heal yourself with each hit you land.

items.name: Bunny Moto
items.description: Gotta go fast like a bunny! Control using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or arrow keys. Hit space to leap up (like a bunny) with this motorcycle.

items.name: Magician's Cloak
items.description: Talk about energy efficient - you can travel all over ROBLOX using only the power of magic- and this cloak.

items.name: RoMaze
items.description: It's romazing.  Unfortunately no one can be told what the RoMaze is. You have to experience it for yourself.

items.name: Bundle of Fireworks
items.description: Light up the night!  Bright, Bright, Bright!

items.name: Retro Shrink Ray
items.description: This shrink ray will make your foes smaller and smaller with each hit!

items.name: Ornate Katana
items.description: Never sacrifice form for function, go for both.

items.name: Amazing Shrinking Elixir
items.description: Tiny is the new giant.

items.name: Yellow Card
items.description: Unsportmanlike Conduct!  One more time and you're out of here!

items.name: Korblox Battlefield Trap
items.description: Place these traps along the battlefield to catch your enemy off guard!
